title: digitaria nigritiana
intro: Digitaria nigritiana, also known as finger grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Digitaria nigritiana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as cough and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
